title: Defining Scope Phase Artifact
description: Shared envelope for every JSON artifact produced by Phases P0-P4 of the Defining Scope KB. Wraps the body of one diagram, list, or summary with status, stop-gap state, and fail-closed checks.

phase_id.description: P0 Intake/Unname · P1 Context Diagram · P2 Use Case Diagram · P3 Scope Tree · P4 Review/Handoff

status.description: first_pass = pre-iteration-break (Step 6). iterated = post iteration break. ready_for_review = STOP GAP about to be presented. approved = PM cleared the STOP GAP.

stop_gap_cleared.description: True only after the PM has explicitly approved the STOP GAP for this phase. Downstream phases MUST refuse to start if their upstream artifact has stop_gap_cleared=false.

body.description: Phase-specific payload. Schema varies by artifact_type — see each phase file's Output Format section.

open_questions.description: Anything the LLM could not resolve and the PM has not yet answered. Carried forward to next phase.

fail_closed_check.description: All five must be true (or N/A for the phase) before stop_gap_cleared can flip to true.

unnamed_system_ok.description: Rule R1: 'The System' has no product/solution name (until P4 Step 8). null = N/A for this phase.

no_subsystems_ok.description: Rule R2: 'The System' is not split into subsystems in the context diagram. null = N/A.

interactions_only_ok.description: Rule R3: No properties/attributes/performance criteria appear as context-diagram boxes. null = N/A.

iteration_break_done.description: Rule R4: Step 6 iteration break performed for context diagram (true after P1 mid-phase STOP GAP). null = N/A.

no_externals_inside_system_box.description: Rule R5: External entities are not placed inside the dashed system boundary. null = N/A.

source_references.description: Paths to source artifacts consulted (course materials, prior phase outputs, PM-provided docs).
